product.trafficLightDesc: Visual compliance status at a glance
product.lpcOpcDesc: Automated retake workflows and assessor conflict detection

hero.title: Stop Tracking Training Compliance in Spreadsheets
hero.subtitle: CertifyCloud automates aviation training compliance for airlines, flight schools, and MROs. Stay EASA & FAA compliant with zero manual tracking.

problem.title: The Hidden Costs of Manual Training Compliance

risk.title: Compliance Risk
risk.description: A single expired OPC can ground your entire fleet operation. Operating with lapsed qualifications leads to regulatory fines and safety hazards.

inefficiency.title: Scheduling Chaos
inefficiency.description: Coordinating training for 100+ crew across multiple aircraft types means endless emails, calendar conflicts, and missed sessions.

visibility.title: Audit Nightmare
visibility.description: 3 days compiling paper protocols for an EASA inspection. Executives discover expired certifications during audits, not before.

features.title: Everything you need for |complete compliance
features.subtitle: From automated tracking to audit-ready reports. One platform, zero spreadsheets.

dashboard.title: Compliance Dashboard
dashboard.description: Traffic-light system (Green/Amber/Red) with department filtering and expiry slider. RPC-optimized for <50ms loads across your entire organization.

scheduler.title: Smart Auto-Scheduler
scheduler.description: Batch schedule sessions across modules respecting preferred days, time slots, instructor availability, and 8-hour daily limits.

signatures.title: Digital Signatures & Seal
signatures.description: Canvas signatures with SHA-256 cryptographic hash and QR verification code on PDFs. Tamper-proof protocols you can trust.

checks.title: Proficiency Checks (OPC/LPC)
checks.description: Item-bank assessment, conflict-of-interest detection, auto-finalization on last assessor sign-off, and protocol generation.

curriculum.title: Curriculum Builder
curriculum.description: Drag-and-drop module sequencing with 3 assessment strategies, semantic versioning, and revision snapshots.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.description: Real-time aggregation across competences, checks, and password expiry. In-app plus batched email alerts.

reports.title: One-Click Audit Reports
reports.description: PDF dossier generation with print/CSV export, monthly compliance scoring, and risk-level classification.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: RBAC (5 roles), RLS tenant isolation, audit trail (~50 semantic actions), password expiry, auditor read-only mode.

dashboard.title: See Who's Compliant at a Glance
dashboard.description: The traffic light dashboard transforms complex compliance data into actionable insights. Green, amber, red status indicators help operations managers prioritize renewals and prevent expiries.

compliance.title: Zero Expired Qualifications
compliance.description: Auto-alerts at configurable thresholds (90/60/30/14/7 days) plus background job scanning ensure no crew member ever operates with lapsed qualifications.
compliance.capability: Configurable alert thresholds with background expiry scanning

time.title: 85% Less Admin Time
time.description: Auto-scheduler handles batch enrollment, session planning respects instructor availability and daily limits. One-click certificate generation replaces manual workflows.
time.capability: Auto-scheduler, batch enrollment, one-click certificate generation

audit.title: Instant Audit Readiness
audit.description: Full immutable audit trail tracking ~50 semantic actions. One-click PDF export generates complete dossiers. Monthly compliance reports with risk-level classification.
audit.capability: Immutable audit trail with ~50 semantic action types

howItWorks.title: From Setup to |Full Compliance
howItWorks.subtitle: See how CertifyCloud takes you from regulatory requirements to audit-ready operations.

step1.title: Define Standards & Curricula
step1.description: Set up regulatory requirements and build training blueprints with modular curricula, assessment strategies, and semantic versioning.

step2.title: Schedule & Execute Training
step2.description: Auto-schedule campaigns, manage sessions, track attendance, and grade in real-time with instructor availability checks.

step3.title: Verify & Certify
step3.description: Conduct proficiency checks (OPC/LPC), collect digital signatures, and auto-generate certificates with cryptographic seals.

step4.title: Monitor & Stay Compliant
step4.description: Traffic-light dashboard with smart alerts, expiring competence reports, and audit-ready PDF export at any time.

platformDeepDive.title: Explore Every |Module
platformDeepDive.subtitle: Interactive walkthrough of CertifyCloud's five core modules.

dashboard.subtitle: Real-time compliance overview
dashboard.feature1: Traffic-light cards showing valid, expiring, and expired competences at a glance
dashboard.feature2: Compliance trend chart with monthly scoring and department-level breakdown
dashboard.feature3: My Actions alert list — pending sign-offs, upcoming expirations, and assigned tasks
dashboard.feature4: Department filter and expiry slider for instant drill-down analysis

training.subtitle: Campaign & session management
training.feature1: Campaign management with batch enrollment and progress tracking bars
training.feature2: Auto-scheduler that respects preferred days, instructor availability, and 8h daily limits
training.feature3: Session management with real-time attendance tracking and grading
training.feature4: Module sequencing with drag-and-drop curriculum builder and versioning

checks.subtitle: OPC/LPC workflow engine
checks.feature1: Full OPC/LPC workflow: Initiate → Evaluate → Sign → Finalize with status tracking
checks.feature2: Item-bank assessment system with configurable grading schemas (1-5, AQP, EBT)
checks.feature3: Conflict-of-interest detection prevents assessors from evaluating their own trainees
checks.feature4: Auto-finalization on last assessor sign-off with QR-verified protocol generation

personnel.subtitle: Role-based access control
personnel.feature1: 5 RBAC roles: Admin, Training Manager, Instructor, Auditor, Employee
personnel.feature2: Auditor read-only mode for external inspection teams with time-limited access
personnel.feature3: Employee dossier with full training history, certifications, and competence status
personnel.feature4: Row-level security (RLS) ensures complete tenant isolation between organizations

reporting.subtitle: Audit-ready export engine
reporting.feature1: Expiring competences slider — filter by 30, 60, or 90-day windows instantly
reporting.feature2: One-click PDF dossier generation with complete audit trail and digital signatures
reporting.feature3: Monthly compliance score with risk-level classification (Green/Amber/Red)
reporting.feature4: Print and CSV export controls for customized regulatory reporting

q1.question: How long does implementation take?
q1.answer: Most organizations are fully operational within 7-10 business days. We provide data migration assistance, user training, and dedicated onboarding support.

q2.question: Is CertifyCloud EASA compliant?
q2.answer: Yes, CertifyCloud is built to comply with EASA ADR.OR.D.017 and FAA Part 121/135 requirements. All audit trails, digital signatures, and records meet regulatory standards.

q3.question: Can we migrate existing data from spreadsheets?
q3.answer: Absolutely. Our team assists with data migration from Excel, Google Sheets, or legacy systems. Historical training records are preserved with complete audit trails.

q4.question: How secure is our data?
q4.answer: CertifyCloud uses enterprise-grade security with row-level isolation, encrypted storage, and GDPR compliance. Each organization's data is completely segregated.

q5.question: What happens if a crew member fails a proficiency check?
q5.answer: CertifyCloud automatically triggers retake workflows, schedules remedial training, and enforces the maximum 3-attempt rule. Assessors receive automated notifications.

q6.question: Do you offer mobile access?
q6.answer: Yes, CertifyCloud is fully responsive and works on tablets/smartphones. Instructors commonly use iPads for digital signatures during training sessions.

q7.question: Can we customize grading schemas?
q7.answer: Yes, CertifyCloud supports standard 1-5 grading, AQP, EBT, and custom schemas. We can configure assessment criteria to match your training standards.

q8.question: What support is included?
q8.answer: All plans include email support. Enterprise and Fleet plans include priority support and dedicated account management.

cta.title: Stop Risking Compliance Violations
cta.subtitle: Automate your aviation training compliance and eliminate manual tracking with CertifyCloud's all-in-one platform.
